description: Common poker decision trees for GTO play in key spots

ip.default_strategy: 3bet or fold with polarized range; flat call with suited connectors and medium pairs

oop.default_strategy: 3bet or fold preferred; flatting OOP is costly, limit to strong implied odds hands

ip.call_range: TT-JJ, AQs, AQo, KQs, suited connectors (position-dependent)

squeeze_spot.ip_squeeze_range: TT+, AKs, AQs+, bluffs suited Ax

flop_decision.medium_hand: Bet small (33%) or check for pot control
flop_decision.draw: Bet as semi-bluff (50-66%) or check to realize equity
flop_decision.air: Bet small (33%) at high frequency on dry boards; give up on wet boards

facing_checkraise.medium_hand: Call if pot odds favorable; fold marginal
facing_checkraise.draw: Call with proper odds; fold weak draws

flop_decision.strong_hand: Bet (50-66%) or check-raise if expect bet behind
flop_decision.air: Check-fold most; c-bet selectively on dry boards

facing_cbet.strong_hand: Raise or call (depending on board texture and opponent tendencies)
facing_cbet.draw: Call with proper odds; raise semi-bluff occasionally
facing_cbet.air: Float dry boards; fold wet boards

when_checked_to.air: Bet 33% to pick up dead money; give up multiway

deep_100bb_plus.notes: More implied odds; speculative hands increase in value; 3bet bluffs more viable
deep_100bb_plus.key_change: Flat call more preflop; play more streets postflop

medium_50bb.notes: SPR decreases; top pair becomes more committing; 4bet = shove with many hands
medium_50bb.key_change: Tighten preflop; commit with top pair + kicker more readily

short_25bb.notes: Push/fold dynamics dominate; 3bet = shove; postflop play simplified
short_25bb.key_change: Open-shove ranges replace standard opens; ICM considerations in tournaments
